chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-253 of 2024 (Ali Muhammad Soomro Vs. Province of Sindh & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Orders on CMA No. 1064/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024. Mr. Asif Ali Mirani, advocate for the petitioner. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Apparently the petitioner and private respondents are litigating with each other on civil/revenue side. In mid of such litigation the petitioner has sought for direction against the official respondents to bring on record letter No. 6238 for decision. The direction sought for by the petitioner, involving the High Court is appearing to be an attempt on his part to hinder ongoing litigation between him and the private respondents on civil/revenue side; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
